parameters.content:
## Accounting Dept - Sales & Invoicing (WF-01)
Invoice generation, Xero sync, PDF + email delivery

value.Description: =High-value invoice {{ $json.invoiceNumber }} for {{ $json.customerName }} - R {{ $json.total }}. Requires manual approval before sending.

parameters.subject: =APPROVAL REQUIRED: Invoice {{ $json.invoiceNumber }} - R {{ $json.total }}
parameters.message:
=

High-Value Invoice Approval Required

Invoice {{ $json.invoiceNumber }} for {{ $json.customerName }} requires your approval before sending.

Invoice #{{ $json.invoiceNumber }}
Customer{{ $json.customerName }}
SubtotalR {{ $json.subtotal }}
VATR {{ $json.vatAmount }}
TotalR {{ $json.total }}

This invoice exceeds the high-value threshold of R 50,000.

Please review and approve or reject in the Airtable Tasks table.

parameters.jsCode:
const inv = $input.first().json; const items = inv.processedLineItems || []; const lineItemsHtml = items.map(item => ` ${item.item_code} ${item.description} ${item.quantity} R ${item.unit_price.toFixed(2)} R ${item.line_vat.toFixed(2)} R ${item.line_total.toFixed(2)} ` ).join('\n'); const html = `

TAX INVOICE

AnyVision Media

Bill To:

${inv.customerName || inv['Customer Name'] || ''}

${inv.customerEmail || ''}

Invoice #: ${inv.invoiceNumber}

Date: ${inv.issueDate || inv['Issue Date'] || new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}

Due: ${inv.dueDate || inv['Due Date'] || ''}
${lineItemsHtml}
Code Description Qty Unit Price VAT Total
Subtotal:R ${inv.subtotal.toFixed(2)}
VAT (15%):R ${inv.vatAmount.toFixed(2)}
Total Due:R ${inv.total.toFixed(2)}

Payment Details:

Bank: [Bank Name]
Account: [Account Number]
Branch Code: [Branch Code]
Reference: ${inv.invoiceNumber}

AnyVision Media | Johannesburg, South Africa
accounts@anyvisionmedia.com | Terms: ${inv.paymentTerms || '30 days'}

`; return { json: { ...inv, emailHtml: html, emailSubject: 'Invoice ' + inv.invoiceNumber + ' from AnyVision Media - R ' + inv.total.toFixed(2), } };

parameters.subject: =ERROR: Accounting WF-01 Sales & Invoicing - {{ $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm') }}

=

Please check the n8n execution log for details.

parameters.content:
## Accounting Dept - Collections & Follow-ups (WF-02)
Overdue invoice reminders, multi-channel, dispute handling

parameters.jsCode:
const inv = $input.first().json; const html = `

AnyVision Media

Hi ${inv.customerName},

Just a friendly heads up that invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} for R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)} is due on ${inv.dueDate}.

If you've already arranged payment, please disregard this message.

Need to discuss payment options? Just reply to this email.

Best regards,
AnyVision Media
Accounts Department

AnyVision Media | Johannesburg, South Africa | accounts@anyvisionmedia.com

`; return { json: { ...inv, emailHtml: html, emailSubject: `Upcoming: Invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} due ${inv.dueDate}`, whatsappMessage: `Hi ${inv.customerName}, friendly reminder that invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} for R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)} is due on ${inv.dueDate}. Please disregard if already paid.`, } };

const inv = $input.first().json; const html = `

AnyVision Media

Hi ${inv.customerName},

This is a reminder that invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} for R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)} is due today (${inv.dueDate}).

Please arrange payment at your earliest convenience. If payment has already been made, kindly forward the proof of payment so we can update our records.

Invoice: ${inv.invoiceNumber}
Amount Due: R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)}
Due Date: ${inv.dueDate}

Kind regards,
AnyVision Media
Accounts Department

AnyVision Media | Johannesburg, South Africa | accounts@anyvisionmedia.com

`; return { json: { ...inv, emailHtml: html, emailSubject: `Due Today: Invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} - R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)}`, whatsappMessage: `Hi ${inv.customerName}, invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} for R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)} is due today (${inv.dueDate}). Please arrange payment or send proof if already paid. Thank you.`, } };

const inv = $input.first().json; const html = `

AnyVision Media

Dear ${inv.customerName},

Our records indicate that invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} for R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)} is now ${Math.abs(inv.daysPastDue)} days overdue.

We understand that oversights happen, but we kindly request that you settle this outstanding amount as soon as possible.

If there are any issues with the invoice or if you require a payment arrangement, please contact us immediately so we can find a solution.

Invoice: ${inv.invoiceNumber}
Amount Overdue: R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)}
Due Date: ${inv.dueDate}
Days Overdue: ${Math.abs(inv.daysPastDue)}

Regards,
AnyVision Media
Accounts Department

AnyVision Media | Johannesburg, South Africa | accounts@anyvisionmedia.com

`; return { json: { ...inv, emailHtml: html, emailSubject: `Overdue: Invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} - ${Math.abs(inv.daysPastDue)} days past due`, whatsappMessage: `Dear ${inv.customerName}, invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} for R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)} is now ${Math.abs(inv.daysPastDue)} days overdue. Please arrange payment urgently or contact us to discuss. - AnyVision Media Accounts`, } };

const inv = $input.first().json; const html = `

AnyVision Media

COLLECTIONS NOTICE

Dear ${inv.customerName},

Despite previous reminders, invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} for R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)} remains unpaid and is now ${Math.abs(inv.daysPastDue)} days overdue.

This invoice has been placed in our collections queue. To avoid further action, please make payment within the next 7 days.

If you are experiencing financial difficulties, we encourage you to contact us immediately to arrange a suitable payment plan.

Invoice: ${inv.invoiceNumber}
Amount Overdue: R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)}
Original Due Date: ${inv.dueDate}
Days Overdue: ${Math.abs(inv.daysPastDue)}
Status: Collections Queue

Regards,
AnyVision Media
Accounts Department

AnyVision Media | Johannesburg, South Africa | accounts@anyvisionmedia.com

`; return { json: { ...inv, emailHtml: html, emailSubject: `COLLECTIONS: Invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} - ${Math.abs(inv.daysPastDue)} days overdue`, whatsappMessage: `COLLECTIONS NOTICE: ${inv.customerName}, invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} for R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)} is ${Math.abs(inv.daysPastDue)} days overdue and has been placed in collections. Please contact us urgently. - AnyVision Media Accounts`, } };

const inv = $input.first().json; const html = `

AnyVision Media

FINAL NOTICE - MANAGEMENT ESCALATION

Dear ${inv.customerName},

This matter has been escalated to management. Invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} for R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)} is now ${Math.abs(inv.daysPastDue)} days overdue and remains unpaid despite multiple reminders.

Please be advised that if payment is not received within 7 days of this notice, we will be compelled to take further action, which may include suspending services, engaging a collections agency, or pursuing legal remedies.

We strongly urge you to settle this account or contact us immediately to discuss a resolution.

Invoice: ${inv.invoiceNumber}
Amount Overdue: R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)}
Original Due Date: ${inv.dueDate}
Days Overdue: ${Math.abs(inv.daysPastDue)}
Status: Escalated to Management
Reminders Sent: ${inv.reminderCount}

Regards,
AnyVision Media
Management

AnyVision Media | Johannesburg, South Africa | accounts@anyvisionmedia.com

`; return { json: { ...inv, emailHtml: html, emailSubject: `FINAL NOTICE: Invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} - Escalated to Management`, emailCc: 'ian@anyvisionmedia.com', whatsappMessage: `FINAL NOTICE: ${inv.customerName}, invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} for R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)} is ${Math.abs(inv.daysPastDue)} days overdue. This has been escalated to management. Please contact us within 7 days to avoid further action. - AnyVision Media Management`, } };

value.Description: ={{ 'Escalation: Invoice ' + $json.invoiceNumber + ' - ' + $json.customerName + '. R ' + $json.balanceDue + ' is ' + Math.abs($json.daysPastDue) + ' days overdue. ' + $json.reminderCount + ' reminders sent. Escalated to management.' }}

value.Action Taken: ={{ 'Sent ' + $('Determine Reminder Stage').first().json.reminderStage + ' reminder via ' + ($('Determine Reminder Stage').first().json.preferredChannel || 'Email') }}
value.Metadata JSON: ={{ JSON.stringify({ stage: $('Determine Reminder Stage').first().json.reminderStage, tone: $('Determine Reminder Stage').first().json.reminderTone, daysPastDue: $('Determine Reminder Stage').first().json.daysPastDue, reminderCount: $('Determine Reminder Stage').first().json.reminderCount + 1, channel: $('Determine Reminder Stage').first().json.preferredChannel, customer: $('Determine Reminder Stage').first().json.customerName }) }}

value.Description: ={{ 'Dispute: Invoice ' + $('Handle Dispute').first().json.invoiceNumber + ' - ' + $('Handle Dispute').first().json.customerName + '. Reason: ' + $('Handle Dispute').first().json.disputeReason + '. Details: ' + ($('Handle Dispute').first().json.disputeDetails || '') }}

value.Metadata JSON: ={{ JSON.stringify({ reason: $('Handle Dispute').first().json.disputeReason, owner: $('Handle Dispute').first().json.disputeOwner, priority: $('Handle Dispute').first().json.priority, customer: $('Handle Dispute').first().json.customerName }) }}

parameters.subject: =ACCOUNTING ERROR - WF-02 Collections - {{ $json.execution.error.message }}
parameters.message:
=

Accounting Department Error - WF-02 Collections

Workflow: {{ $json.workflow.name }}

Error: {{ $json.execution.error.message }}

Node: {{ $json.execution.lastNodeExecuted }}

Time: {{ $now.toISO() }}

View Execution

parameters.content:
## WF-02: Collections & Follow-ups

**Daily 7AM Run:**
1. Reads all open/overdue invoices from Airtable
2. Loops through each invoice
3. Looks up customer details
4. Determines reminder stage based on days relative to due date
5. Builds appropriate HTML email + WhatsApp message
6. Sends via preferred channel
7. Updates invoice reminder tracking
8. Logs to audit trail

**Stages:** T-3 (friendly) | Due (reminder) | T+3 (firm) | T+7 (collections) | T+14 (escalation)

## Dispute Handling

POST /accounting/dispute

Accepts: {invoice_number, reason, details, customer_name, customer_email}

1. Parses dispute and assigns owner based on reason
2. Updates invoice status to Disputed
3. Creates Dispute Resolution task
4. Writes DISPUTE_OPENED audit log entry

## Error Handling

Catches any unhandled errors and sends notification email to ian@anyvisionmedia.com.

## Accounting Dept - Payments & Reconciliation (WF-03)
Stripe/PayFast capture, AI matching, receipt sending

value.Title: ={{ 'Reconcile payment ' + $json.paymentId + ' - R' + $json.amount }}
value.Description: ={{ 'Payment of R' + $json.amount + ' from ' + ($json.payerName || $json.payerEmail || 'Unknown') + ' via ' + $json.method + '. Reference: ' + ($json.reference || 'None') + '. AI confidence: ' + ($json.matchConfidence || 0) + '. Reasoning: ' + ($json.matchReasoning || 'N/A') }}

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json; const html = `

PAYMENT RECEIPT

AnyVision Media

Hi ${data.matchedCustomerName || 'Customer'},

Thank you for your payment. This confirms we have received:

Amount Received:R ${data.amount.toFixed(2)}
Payment Method:${data.method}
Date:${data.dateReceived}
Invoice:${data.matchedInvoiceNumber || 'N/A'}
Remaining Balance:R ${(data.newBalanceDue || 0).toFixed(2)}
${data.paymentType === 'partial' ? '

Note: This is a partial payment. The remaining balance is shown above.

' : ''} ${data.paymentType === 'overpayment' ? '

Note: An overpayment of R ' + data.overpaymentAmount.toFixed(2) + ' was detected. This will be applied as a credit.

' : ''}

AnyVision Media | Johannesburg, South Africa | accounts@anyvisionmedia.com
`; return { json: { ...data, receiptHtml: html, receiptSubject: 'Payment Receipt - ' + (data.matchedInvoiceNumber || 'AnyVision Media'), customerEmail: data.payerEmail || '', } };

parameters.content:
## Accounting Dept - Supplier Bills AP (WF-04)
Email bill intake, AI extraction, approval routing, Xero sync

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "{{ $("System Config").item.json.aiModel }}",
  "messages": [
    {"role": "system", "content": "You are an accounts payable document processor. Extract the following fields from this supplier invoice/bill email.

Return JSON only, no markdown:
{
  "supplier_name": "Company name of the supplier",
  "invoice_number": "Supplier's invoice number",
  "bill_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
  "due_date": "YYYY-MM-DD (estimate if not shown: bill_date + 30 days)",
  "subtotal": 0.00,
  "vat_amount": 0.00,
  "total_amount": 0.00,
  "line_items": [{"description": "", "amount": 0.00}],
  "supplier_email": "sender email if available",
  "currency": "ZAR",
  "confidence": 0.0-1.0
}

Rules:
- If VAT is 15% of subtotal, extract separately
- If only total is shown, estimate subtotal = total / 1.15 and VAT = total - subtotal
- Set confidence based on how clearly the data was extractable
- If a field is missing, use null"},
    {"role": "user", "content": {{ JSON.stringify($json.extractionInput) }}}
  ],
  "temperature": 0.1,
  "max_tokens": 2000
}

parameters.content:
## Accounting Dept - Month End Close (WF-05)
Aged receivables/payables, AI summary, management pack

value.Description: =Month-End Reconciliation: {{ $json.discrepancyCount }} discrepancies found. Issues: {{ $json.discrepancies.map(d => d.type + ': ' + d.description).join(' | ') }}

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $('Reconciliation Check').first().json; const config = $('System Config').first().json; const dateInfo = $('Check Last Business Day').first().json; // Helper to format currency const fmt = (v) => `R ${(v || 0).toFixed(2).replace(/\B(?=(\d{3})+(?!\d))/g, ',')}`; // Build AR aging rows const arBuckets = [ { label: 'Current (0-30 days)', amount: data.arSummary.current }, { label: '31-60 days', amount: data.arSummary.days_31_60 }, { label: '61-90 days', amount: data.arSummary.days_61_90 }, { label: '91-120 days', amount: data.arSummary.days_91_120 }, { label: '120+ days', amount: data.arSummary.days_120_plus }, ]; const arRows = arBuckets.map(b => `${b.label}${fmt(b.amount)}` ).join(''); // Build AP aging rows const apBuckets = [ { label: 'Current (0-30 days)', amount: data.apSummary.current }, { label: '31-60 days', amount: data.apSummary.days_31_60 }, { label: '61-90 days', amount: data.apSummary.days_61_90 }, { label: '91-120 days', amount: data.apSummary.days_91_120 }, { label: '120+ days', amount: data.apSummary.days_120_plus }, ]; const apRows = apBuckets.map(b => `${b.label}${fmt(b.amount)}` ).join(''); // Build exceptions list const discrepancies = data.discrepancies || []; const exceptionRows = discrepancies.length > 0 ? discrepancies.map(d => `${d.type}${d.description}${fmt(d.amount)}` ).join('') : 'No exceptions found'; const html = ` Month-End Management Pack

Month-End Management Pack

${dateInfo.monthName} | ${config.companyName}

Executive Summary

Total Receivables

${fmt(data.totalAR)}

Total Payables

${fmt(data.totalAP)}

Net Position

${fmt(data.netPosition)}

Cash Received

${fmt(data.totalPaymentsReceived)}

Aged Receivables

${arRows}
Aging Bucket Amount
Total (${data.invoiceCount} invoices) ${fmt(data.totalAR)}

Aged Payables

${apRows}
Aging Bucket Amount
Total (${data.billCount} bills) ${fmt(data.totalAP)}

Cash Flow Snapshot

Payments Received This Month${fmt(data.totalPaymentsReceived)}
Number of Payments${data.paymentCount}
Outstanding Receivables${fmt(data.totalAR)}
Outstanding Payables${fmt(data.totalAP)}
Net Position (AR - AP)${fmt(data.netPosition)}

Exceptions & Discrepancies (${data.discrepancyCount})

${exceptionRows}
Type Description Amount

Monthly Totals

Open Invoices${data.invoiceCount}
Open Bills${data.billCount}
Payments Received${data.paymentCount}
Audit Log Entries${data.auditLogCount}
Discrepancies Found${data.discrepancyCount}

${config.companyName} | Month-End Close Report | Generated ${dateInfo.todayDate}
This is an automated report generated by the AnyVision Media Accounting System.

`; return { json: { ...data, managementPackHtml: html, monthName: dateInfo.monthName, todayDate: dateInfo.todayDate, monthStart: dateInfo.monthStart, monthEnd: dateInfo.monthEnd, } };

value.Value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ date: $('Parse AI Summary').first().json.todayDate, month: $('Parse AI Summary').first().json.monthName, totalAR: $('Parse AI Summary').first().json.totalAR, totalAP: $('Parse AI Summary').first().json.totalAP, netPosition: $('Parse AI Summary').first().json.netPosition, discrepancies: $('Parse AI Summary').first().json.discrepancyCount }) }}

parameters.content:
## Accounting Dept - Master Data & Audit (WF-06)
Config cache, audit log webhook, customer CRUD

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'success', customer_id: $json['Customer ID'] || $json['id'], synced_to_xero: true }) }}

parameters.content:
## Config Refresh Flow

Runs hourly (or manually) to:
1. Set system defaults (date, company, AI model, currency, VAT)
2. Read all config from Airtable System Config table
3. Parse JSON values into structured config object
4. Log the refresh to Audit Log

## Audit Log Webhook

POST /accounting/audit-log

Accepts: {workflow, event_type, record_type, record_id, action, actor, result, error, metadata}

Called by other accounting workflows (WF-07 to WF-10) to log all actions.

## Customer CRUD Webhook

POST /accounting/customer

Accepts: {action: 'create'|'update', customer data}

Validates email/VAT, upserts to Airtable Customers table, syncs to Xero Contacts API.

## Error Handling

Catches any unhandled errors and sends notification email to ian@anyvisionmedia.com.

## Accounting Dept - Exception Handler (WF-07)
Task queue, overdue escalation, approval webhook

parameters.subject: =ESCALATION: Overdue Task - {{ $json['Task Type'] || $json['Description'] || 'Unknown' }}
parameters.message:

Task Escalation Notice

The following task has been automatically escalated due to being overdue.

Due Date{{ $json['Due At'] || $json['Due Date'] || 'N/A' }}
Days Overdue{{ $json.daysPastDue }} days
Related Record{{ $json['Related Invoice'] || $json['Related Bill'] || 'N/A' }}
Assigned To{{ $json['Assigned To'] || 'Unassigned' }}

Please review and take action on this task immediately.

AnyVision Media Accounting System
